prerequisites: A ConfigCat account with access to the data you want to read (https://app.configcat.com).
Public API credentials (a Basic Auth username and password) generated from the ConfigCat dashboard.
The connector authenticates against the ConfigCat Public Management API at base URL https://api.configcat.com.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic authentication (Public API credentials)
authMethods.summary: The ConfigCat Public Management API uses the HTTP Basic Authentication Scheme. The connector sends the configured username and password (a Public API credential pair) in the Authorization request header. Provide the credential's Basic Auth user name in the username field and the corresponding password in the password field.

setupSteps.title: Create Public API credentials in ConfigCat
setupSteps.body: Sign in to ConfigCat and open the Public API credentials management page at https://app.configcat.com/my-account/public-api-credentials. Generate a new credential, which produces a Basic Auth user name and password pair used to authenticate with the Public Management API.

setupSteps.title: Provide the username
setupSteps.body: Enter the Basic Auth user name from your generated Public API credential into the connector's required username field.

setupSteps.title: Provide the password
setupSteps.body: Enter the password from the same Public API credential into the connector's required password field. This value is secret, so store it securely.

setupSteps.title: Verify the connection
setupSteps.body: The connector calls the ConfigCat Public Management API (base URL https://api.configcat.com) using HTTP Basic authentication. Confirm the credentials work by running a connection check; a successful authenticated request confirms setup is complete.

sources.title: ConfigCat Public Management API (official OpenAPI spec, authentication section)
